nasb.text: “How can you say, ‘I am not defiled, I have not gone after the Baals’? Look at your way in the valley! Know what you have done! You are a swift young camel entangling her ways,

esv.text: How can you say, ‘I am not unclean, I have not gone after the Baals’? Look at your way in the valley; know what you have done— a restless young camel running here and there,

cnv.text: “你怎麼能說：‘我沒有玷污自己， 未曾跟從過巴力’呢？ 看看你在谷中的行徑， 想想你所作過的！ 簡直像快捷的小雌駝，在路上亂闖；

ccb.text: “你怎能说， ‘我没有玷污自己， 也没有随从巴力’？ 看看你在山谷中干的勾当， 想想你的所作所为。 你是一只发情的母骆驼， 烦躁不安，跑来跑去。
